title: Bālā Tripurasundarī Sādhana (Bālā Pañcadaśākṣarī)
century: Vāmakeśvara Tantra c. 9th–11th c.; Paraśurāma Kalpasūtra c. 10th–12th c.
description: The entry-level upāsanā of the Śrī Vidyā tradition, addressed to Bālā Tripurasundarī ("the nine-year-old form" of Lalitā) using the fifteen-syllable *pañcadaśākṣarī* mantra in its Bālā-form. High caution — a Śrī Vidyā dīkṣā-gated mantra; the entry-point of the broader Śrī Vidyā curriculum but nonetheless a vidyā of the Śākta-Mahāvidyā class. Preserved here as heritage / source material.
